content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market is weak — Nifty -1.26%, IT crashing -5.28%, VIX up 4.25% to 19.38. Defensive FMCG and pharma rotation is clearly in play. Book is 67% deployed with small unrealized loss; priority is position management (trailing SLs on winners, tightening losers) rather than adding beta. Event risk is heavy next week (AUBANK Apr 25, GRANULES/HINDUNILVR/SCHAEFFLER Apr 29-30).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23700,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Entry at 81.50 was near top; CMP 76.85 leaves us -5.8%. SL at 74.50 is 3% away. Q4 FY26 was strong (PAT +27%, GNPA 1.45%), stock has been consolidating above 20DMA (69.41). Thesis intact but chase-the-high entry is hurting. Hold with existing SL — do not tighten, price needs room above 76 pivot support."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1000.00,
      "new_target": 1100.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+4.3% gain, strong Q4 (PAT +18%, GNPA 0.93%), broker target Rs 1143. Loosening SL from 1011.65 to 1000 would be a VIOLATION — instead keep SL TIGHT at 1000 (just below VWAP 1019 / psychological 1000 support). Wait — 1011.65 is higher than 1000. Cannot loosen. Emitting HOLD instead.",
      "quantity": 0
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, -1%. Gold softened on US-Iran de-escalation but VIX spiking could re-trigger bid. SL 119 is 3.9% below; acceptable for ETF hedge. Keep as is."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "new_target": 1500.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high with strong Q4 (PAT +26%, revenue +23%). Tighten SL from 1395 to 1405 (below VWAP 1418 but above key intraday support). Target unchanged. Locking in minimal downside while letting defensive leader run."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "new_target": 1130.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "Near 52w high, Q4 results tomorrow (Apr 25) — binary event. Tighten SL from 1040 to 1045 (just below today's low 1047 and psychological 1050). Reduces risk into event without exiting — if Q4 beats, target 1130 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 5,
      "reasoning": "At 52w high, Q4 on Apr 29 (5 days). SL at entry (681) = breakeven, already locked in. Do not tighten further — needs room to absorb volatility into earnings. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "At -2.8%, SL at 2260 is 2% below CMP. Q4 results Apr 30. Thesis (FMCG rotation, Nestle readthrough, Jefferies target 2850) intact despite today's -2.35% selloff. Keep SL — tightening into a pullback would risk being stopped out right before results catalyst."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "-0.9%, SL at 393 is 2% below. Q4 on May 15. Power sector outperformer but NTPC lagging. Keep SL, do not tighten."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "ONESOURCE",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Up 13.7% in 5 sessions — too extended to chase. Parabolic move on a falling-market day is FOMO territory. Wait for pullback to 1700-1750."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GLENMARK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Fresh ATH yesterday but today reversed -0.65% from high with wide range (2372 to 2289). Ran +65% 1Y, momentum-chase risk at ATH into a weak tape. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "OFSS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already gapped ~9% on results. Chasing 8800 post-earnings after +28% two-day move is poor R:R. Dividend Rs 270 ex-div May 7. Wait for consolidation."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "HUDCO",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Already exposed to financials/housing via PNBHOUSING + MAHABANK + AUBANK. Cluster discipline — no more rate-sensitive financials. Skip."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "DRREDDY",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.45,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish research (Brazil rejection, -10% 1Y). Volume recovery from gap-down is interesting but thesis weak. Pass."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "CLEAN",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.35,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Bearish fundamentals (PAT -30%, revenue -13%), stock opened strong but closed near lows after high-volume session — distribution pattern. Avoid."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "SCHAEFFLER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Results Apr 29, trading window closed, book already at 67% deployed. Pass on binary event entry."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 74.50 — keep. Price at 76.85 still above 20DMA; 2% buffer appropriate given -5.8% drawdown."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1011.65 already above VWAP and effectively locks +2.8% gain. Further tightening would risk whipsaw given 3% intraday range. Target 1100 intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; keep SL 119 until VIX regime clarifies."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1405.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten from 1395 to 1405 — below today's intraday lows but preserves small cushion. 52w high breakout needs protection."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "AUBANK",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "reasoning": "Earnings Apr 25 — tighten modestly from 1040 to 1045 (~0.9% below CMP) to de-risk event exposure while keeping target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GRANULES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven 681. Earnings Apr 29 — need volatility room."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Thesis for Apr 30 print intact; SL 2260 already 2% below — tightening into pullback = whipsaw risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Results May 15; SL 393 appropriate."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "ONESOURCE and GLENMARK interesting momentum names — watch for pullback to 10DMA / prior breakout level. OFSS post-results consolidation worth monitoring for entry in Rs 8400-8500 zone. PPLPHARMA, EMCURE on pharma rotation watch. SCHAEFFLER post Apr 29 results if margin clarity emerges.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book 67% deployed with -0.23% total P&L — concentrated event-risk next week (AUBANK Apr 25, GRANULES/SCHAEFFLER Apr 29, HINDUNILVR Apr 30). Defensive posture correct: tightening SLs on winners near highs (NESTLE, AUBANK) and standing down on new entries despite the watchlist expansion. Financial cluster (MAHABANK+PNBHOUSING+AUBANK) is ~28% of book — at limit, no more bank/HFC adds. VIX +4% warns against chasing breakouts. Quality > quantity; no new buys today."
}
